src: A waterfall cascading down a rugged cliff, surrounded by greenery and moss-covered rocks. Water splashes into a pool below, with mist and sunlight. A stone bridge arches over the waterfall, framed by trees and vibrant foliage.
edit: A vibrant anime waterfall cascades down a rugged cliff with mossy rocks, surrounded by lush greenery. The water splashes into a pool with mist illuminated by sunlight. A stone bridge arches over the waterfall, framed by foliage and vivid plants, enhancing the anime ambiance.

per_image_non_shared_src.click-sluice-0bunJlJn69U-unsplash: The waterfall is centered with sunlight streaming through tree branches, tall trees with dark leaves surround. A stone bridge is in the middle, with dense green foliage and mossy rocks at the sides.
per_image_non_shared_src.dave-hoefler-DBGb9u1Yf6Q-unsplash: A waterfall is centered with golden autumn leaves surrounding it. A stone bridge stands in the middle of the cascading water. The foreground has green shrubbery and brown tree trunks.
per_image_non_shared_src.dave-hoefler-t56YSk_5SPc-unsplash: The waterfall cascades down steep rocks, surrounded by lush greenery and steep cliffs, with a stone bridge arching over the lower cascade and abundant moss and foliage covering the rocks.
per_image_non_shared_src.david-lindahl-WC0W0sESCow-unsplash: Waterfall in the center with mist, surrounded by barren trees, a stone bridge in the middle, with grey rocks and sparse foliage.
per_image_non_shared_src.ethan-dow-5wJiUOE6YNM-unsplash: Waterfall flows down a cliff face, framed by dense green trees and bright sunlight. A stone bridge spans the middle, vibrant foliage covers the cliffs.

per_image_non_shared_edit.click-sluice-0bunJlJn69U-unsplash: A majestic waterfall in anime-style, with vibrant sunlight through tree branches, tall trees with dark leaves. A stone bridge with exaggerated lines arches in the center. Green foliage and mossy rocks line the sides.
per_image_non_shared_edit.dave-hoefler-DBGb9u1Yf6Q-unsplash: A centered waterfall surrounded by golden autumn leaves in anime style. A stone bridge arches over the water. In the foreground, green shrubbery and brown tree trunks with exaggerated detail complete the anime scene.
per_image_non_shared_edit.dave-hoefler-t56YSk_5SPc-unsplash: A waterfall cascades down steep rocks with vibrant colors, surrounded by lush green scenery. An intricately detailed stone bridge with moss and foliage arches over the lower cascade, in an anime style.
per_image_non_shared_edit.david-lindahl-WC0W0sESCow-unsplash: A waterfall glows centrally with mist rising in an anime style. Barren trees and a stone bridge arch across, embodying a classic aesthetic. Grey rocks with shadows and sparse, vibrant-colored foliage complete the serene scene.
per_image_non_shared_edit.ethan-dow-5wJiUOE6YNM-unsplash: A waterfall cascades down a cliff, framed by dense green trees in anime clarity. A stone bridge with exaggerated curves stretches across the middle, vibrant foliage on cliff sides, each leaf detailed in anime style, creating a fantastical animated scene.
